prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年第26名（近年稳定在24–27名），属全国顶尖综合性大学；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，涉及校园安全 事件（浴池翻找衣物等13件负面事件），抖音热度排名第40（较热），但负面舆情可能抑制部分考生报考意愿；2025年投档异常中关注度中等（江苏法学暴跌、黑龙江临床组下降 ）；考古学A+、马克思主义理论A+、化学A、法学A、数学A、机械工程A、物理学A、兽医学A、计算机科学与技术A-等15个A-/A/A+学科，学科实力雄厚。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学等热门专业持续高热，对高分考生吸引力强；本省2026年考生总数474900，按近年比例估算物理类约267800人 ，较2025年物理类266425人略增，竞争微幅加剧；吉林大学位于吉林省长春市，距江西较远，跨省就读需适应北方气候，但985 层次对江西考生仍有较强吸引力；该校在江西省招生占比约3.3%（2025年），属中等偏小规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年稳定在10400附近、2026年小幅扩招2.8%、 本省考生略增、声誉负面舆情可能抑制报考热度，在2025年基准10399名基础上预计位次略后移；预测最低位次约10522名，区间10022–11022名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 6082 → 11553 → 7341 → 10658 → 10399, with significant fluctuations in recent years. After a drop to 11553 in 2022 due to a gap, it rebounded and stabilized around 10400 in the last two years; the baseline for 2025 is about 10399. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 110 in 2021, 107 in 2022, 106 in 2023, 104 in 2024, and 108 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 111, a slight expansion of about 2.8% compared to 2025, easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 26th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (stable at 24–27 in recent years), belonging to the top-tier comprehensive universities nationwide. The 2026 reputation evaluation is significantly negative, involving campus safety incidents (13 negative events such as rummaging through clothes in bathhouses), with Douyin popularity ranking 40th (relatively hot), but negative public opinion may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. In 2025, the attention level in abnormal admissions was moderate (Jiangsu Law plummeted, Heilongjiang Clinical Medicine group declined). It has 15 A-/A/A+ disciplines including Archaeology A+, Marxist Theory A+, Chemistry A, Law A, Mathematics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Physics A, Veterinary Medicine A, Computer Science and Technology A-, etc., with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine continue to be highly sought after, attracting high-scoring candidates. The total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is 474,900, with an estimated Physics Category of about 267,800 based on recent proportions, a slight increase from 266,425 in 2025, intensifying competition marginally. Jilin University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, far from Jiangxi, requiring adaptation to the northern climate for cross-province study, but the 985 level still has strong appeal for Jiangxi candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Jiangxi Province is about 3.3% (2025), which is moderately small.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable ranking around 10400 in the last two years, a slight expansion of 2.8% in 2026, a slight increase in provincial candidates, and negative public opinion potentially suppressing application enthusiasm, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward based on the 2025 baseline of 10399; the predicted minimum ranking is about 10522, with a range of 10022–11022.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 10022), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1086 → 1290 → 1053 → 1425 → 1443, showing a general backward shift in recent years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 390 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1443; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 23 in 2020 and 2021, 27 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 28 in 2024, and 28 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 24, a reduction of about 14.3% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 26th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, a top national comprehensive university; the 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving campus safety incidents (13 negative incidents such as rummaging through clothes in bathhouses), Douyin popularity ranking 40th (relatively hot), negative public opinion may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; the 2025 abnormal admission attention is moderate; Archaeology A+, Marxist Theory A+, Law A, Political Science A-, Philosophy A-, etc., with outstanding advantages in liberal arts disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Literature and other popular liberal arts majors continue to be relatively hot; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is 474,900, with an estimated History Category of about 207,000 based on recent proportions, a slight increase from 206,055 in 2025, leading to a slight intensification of competition; Jilin University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, far from Jiangxi, requiring adaptation to the northern climate for cross-province study, but the 985 level still has strong appeal to Jiangxi candidates; the university's enrollment share in Jiangxi Province is about 3.3%.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift of historical rankings in recent years, a significant enrollment reduction of 14.3% in 2026, and a slight increase in provincial candidates, competition is expected to intensify significantly based on the 2025 baseline of 1443, with rankings moving forward (numerical decrease); the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1339, with a range of 1148–1530.
